# UX Checklist: Select Location by Clicking on Map

**Purpose**: Validate UX requirements completeness, clarity, and coverage for the map click estimate flow.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/003-uc03-feature-spec/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all user-visible UI states specified for valid click, resolution failure, out-of-boundary, and partial data? [Completeness, Spec §Main Flow, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [ ] CHK002 Are click precision requirements (5 decimal places) reflected in UI guidance or validation messaging? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §Functional Requirements] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
- [ ] CHK003 Are UI requirements defined for snapping behavior messaging when clicks fall between parcels? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK004 Are click-to-coordinate mapping requirements stated clearly enough for user-facing messaging? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK005 Are map entry and interaction labels specified consistently and unambiguously? [Ambiguity, Spec §Main Flow]
- [x] CHK006 Are success display requirements specific about placement of estimate at/near click? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK007 Do the success criteria and functional requirements align on estimate range and numeric constraints? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Success Criteria]
- [x] CHK008 Are partial-data warning requirements consistent across alternate flows and acceptance scenarios? [Consistency, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK009 Are requirements defined for retry behavior after resolution failure? [Coverage, Spec §Alternate Flows]
- [x] CHK010 Are requirements defined for rapid repeated clicks (latest click wins) in the UI? [Coverage, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK011 Are accessibility requirements defined for keyboard map interactions and error messaging? [Gap] Note: Necessary (constitution UX consistency); /prompts:speckit.plan rerun.
